action.reasoning: Observation: IndexError due to mask shape [32,99] vs logits shape [32,97,50] — model output has num_skills dim (50) instead of 1, and T mismatch. Analysis: model.py incorrectly outputs per-skill logits and may trim one step, causing dimension mismatch. Decision: rewrite model.py to output [B,T,1] logits with correct forward interface. Fix train.py to squeeze logits before masking, align shifts, and handle dimensions correctly. Train 5 epochs, save best checkpoint, submit eval.
